name: spec-bifrost
description: Create, validate, preview, and export page-driven B-end requirement prototypes from local JSON.

interface.shortDescription: Create requirements prototypes from local JSON
interface.longDescription: Spec Bifrost helps Codex create and maintain a local spec-bifrost.json, validate its schema and references, preview a multi-page B-end requirement prototype, and guide frontend/backend Markdown requirement exports.
defaultPrompt: Create a Spec Bifrost prototype for this product idea.
Validate my spec-bifrost.json and fix any issues.
Preview this Spec Bifrost prototype locally.
